invariants.context: The public HME surface has one source of truth: i/ wrappers match i_registry.json, retired wrappers stay gone, tool-invocations.json maps internal names to current public forms, and doc/ top-level stays limited to self-coherence.md/composition.md plus full-detail companions.

invariants.description: HME full reference must include LIFESAVER enforcement
Every strong-negative correlation (r <= -0.4) in metrics/trace.jsonl must be accounted for in metrics/hme-suspected-upstreams.json as candidate, confirmed, or refuted.
invariants.context: Every strong-negative correlation (r <= -0.4) in metrics/trace.jsonl must be accounted for in metrics/hme-suspected-upstreams.json as candidate, confirmed, or refuted. An unaccounted negative correlation means the system is observing a tension it has not named per the antagonism-bridge principle. See doc/composition-full.md.
